name: personal-stack-health
label: Stack Health
description: One-glance health check for personal long-running services. Monitors: ComfyUI_Ideogram (port 8194), n8n (port 5678), OpenClaw gateway (port 18789), prayer pipeline v3 (port 5000), Hermes gateway. Shows PID, port listening status, RSS memory, uptime per service. 30s polling. v0.2.
